content_body: We had a fantastic time at Riverview Lodge celebrating my parents' 50th Anniversary. The accommodations were fantastic, and I appreciate all that your team did for us in helping to secure the reservation. I too own a vacation rental company, and we could not have been more pleased with our rental. The Cabin Rentals of Georgia team was very helpful in our booking process and beyond. After finding Riverview Lodge on VRBO, I knew to book directly with Cabin Rentals of Georgia rather than paying ridiculous VRBO fees. I really appreciated the fact that Taylor called me back promptly after receving a question that I had submitted through a 3rd party inquiry. She was very helpful and I was able to book throug her which saved me over $250 in 3rd party fees.The property was extremely clean and well maintined. Many essentials were provided and the home was well stocked. The beds were comfortable and the sheets and towels were super nice. I highly recommend Riverview Lodge and Cabin Rentals of Georgia!
title: Book Direct and Not Through VRBO!
